reviews.review_description: The movement is very smooth and the way the player models look is just awesome!
I’m the mod TIKO I got suspended from the mod room and foxie the mod said it would get fixed but it didn’t

The game is genuinely fire the only issue is tots not the full release and so its hard to get back up to the shop area the game has a nice team of mods and a decent community but it also just came on applab today so not many will be on so have fun playing munki
I’m a admin/dev and this game 🔥 no cap lol but Fr this game is really fun 🤩

This is a really good fan game and I give it five stars because it’s a really nice community and it is free and you will probably see owners in a lot of moderators in the game and we’re very active so this is like a very good fan game for people that like fan games that they could play

The thought put into this game is amazing. The talent the creaters have I immaculate the detail is amazing the mods and owners are very nice especially you MR and XEN. For the short amount of time they worked on it, it was still amazing, and I can't wait for horror

reviews.review_title: best gtag fan game ever totally not bias
reviews.review_description: so i may or may not be an admin but thats out of the point, THIS GAME IS FIRE
